name: Chunky Pizza Soup
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven broiler.
2. Heat oil over medium heat. Stir-fry onion, mushrooms, and green peppers until soft, not browned.
3. Add tomatoes, stock, pepperoni, and basil. Cook until heated through.
4. Ladle soup into ovenproof bowls and sprinkle with cheese.
5. Broil until cheese melts and is bubbly.
